textByHashes.5ea054d54aec847192b0ddba86d620cc76f84e5b: Lovely? Oh - er - if you say so. But please excuse me, I really don't have time to chat about the weather.
textByHashes.cc3f101563a7281d23a1585a61e3ae22301bda93: Trolls! They're attacking my fishing Colony!
textByHashes.3b2f8c62f3e807e6c0677c183db6858f0e13699e: These are a sort of sea-dwelling troll. They feed on the monkfish that live in this part of the sea, but just recently they've started invading my Colony!
textByHashes.5789b09cfb6d234d6be30ebc86ffb1a110928c52: Well yes, I do. I've done some research about this, and I think our best hope is to get hold of an experienced adventurer.
textByHashes.0b4076d92f166481da564ad589e88acad61fb1a3: In all the legends I've read, brave adventurers have no trouble vanquishing whatever monsters are menacing the helpless settlement.
textByHashes.92b6f56c405885602a7c342529a713d18092487f: Yes, I've done my research very carefully. I've always made important decisions based on careful analysis of whatever documents are available to me on the topic. For example, I chose this site for my Fishing Colony because
textByHashes.4570f9dd01ea799a1f530fe46559a520f547a8e9: records show this part of the sea to be a prime site for catching monkfish. I don't just fumble along like an amateur!
textByHashes.9a8eb0de02a013e07733957e1e81f7400fe7475b: Yes, that's right. A brave adventurer with plenty of experience in this sort of work.
textByHashes.bbac1ce9e2fbfa3f2ccafb83031b17ef9a47cf89: You? I hadn't thought of that... let's have a look at you...
textByHashes.9a59f767e020e3669119952a179543442697147c: No, I'm sorry, but you simply do not have enough experience. I've got a LOT at stake here, and I can't afford to have an amateur getting in the way.
textByHashes.72ad3a3b230ec972851271a1d40dbb373e41cad5: Hmmm... You're not what I'm looking for, but... Quest Points is really rather a lot...
textByHashes.8adfc59e9999d8126fa50c7e17705b55984b8580: Ok, the Piscatoris Fishing Colony gratefully accepts your offer of help. When the Colony is safe you shall be handsomely rewarded.
textByHashes.69d2ce0eb76e48301c04533f1a25c92a0e5ba712: Well, as qualified as you undoubtedly are, I believe we're going to need a truly expert adventurer if the Colony is to stand a chance.
textByHashes.337d7b7632c746d902d891b39badea8a0fc20200: If you could just stop blowing your own trumpet for a minute...
textByHashes.b70c742418d21e137b41af2422525ca829d2ea51: Excellent! Now, in far-away Misthalin there lives one of the greatest adventurers of all time.
textByHashes.6ab8334e757c45120817c61e57b0d3bdc0c4740e: His name is lost in the mists of time, but you shouldn't have much trouble finding the Wise Old Man of Draynor Village.
textByHashes.726b7396f9ad8491bd86d73653ab40d14d3e5230: Maybe, but he's still an expert adventurer.
textByHashes.2a1e94f6f2eb54c90617e1a7fe711ead55abe6c2: Ah well, we must forgive him his little foibles.
textByHashes.ebf476c0fb55de2f06c7cb059880177cdf4a6c3b: Well, he presumably has a name, but that's what he's called now.
textByHashes.11f1f81bb7368895bbfe874c5ebd1d7345187be7: You don't sound convinced. Look, I'll tell you what I've read about him...
textByHashes.6d8ca4b4b97ee5ffea241e061a4a609adcfde4e0: Yes, that's right. And do watch out for the sea trolls!
textByHashes.fbe42e7ca2e633f37b8672ecda1bef45efc98dfd: Ah, . I was wondering where you'd got to.
textByHashes.d8dd785a5f2153738dc735eb2677ce8190b99939: Go to Draynor Village and fetch the Wise Old Man to help save the Colony!
textByHashes.809b83820172e65f9e0b64b7a4c39bfcea95cdea: No! Now go and do what I told you!
textByHashes.3262b46c440db27b26efe45ba5a79ab750394f81: Finally you've arrived! Did you bring the Wise Old Man?
textByHashes.39093506d4db5075823306f84840543ea8e47512: Excellent! You have no idea how grateful I am!
textByHashes.0de9bc0abec730d04f0cbdeec70cacdd8419a0c0: Reward? Well... we've got to discuss the Colony's defences now. Perhaps you could go and make yourself useful around the Colony? I'm sure my brother, Franklin, could do with a bit of help. Arnold, the storemaster, said he needed an extra pair of hands too. He's in one of the big storage sheds.
textByHashes.e5345ba0ad64c4cae2e4a069e2a5c00e5d8ce35e: Yes, yes... now please excuse us.
textByHashes.b8d32a59a11ba433bcb825e713fdc3432aa30b9a: ? Have you helped Franklin and Arnold yet?
textByHashes.f6b2278ef09a728779fa96b550a3232a23c3aab2: That's what I like to hear. Off you go...
textByHashes.d68b4fe6da6202a4d3625b314a31b19682e6a93e: There's something else I need you to do first.
textByHashes.2e32d396709eb88721f614f103a397b930df25f1: Well, the Wise Old Man and I have discussed the situation, and he's come up with a plan...
textByHashes.686fb959ea5b65e2cc8d57726a895af294ded9ae: I sent most of the colonists away for their own safety when the trolls started attacking the Colony.
textByHashes.518a6e90e441603d43c0e1706b3948fd42aad3fb: Go to the Wizards' Guild in Yanille and ask Wizard Frumscone to lend us an army to save the Colony!
textByHashes.d7c2150c89d93d8c5a2c5968df5d6bf18b607a00: He said he'd be back in a minute. But never mind him - go to Falador and talk to this wizard!
textByHashes.a2728f0f971b0efde58df74d1f3c57a3c4882a83: You can talk about that later! Now we've got an army we can get on with beating the trolls!
textByHashes.f643ff6f9a100c960124c679771e4db68579b5c5: Come back to us as soon as you're ready.
textByHashes.a0dc92f8f65502460b4d662d7da9c633655b8f3d: , how can I ever thank you? You have saved my Fishing Colony from utter destruction!
textByHashes.5ecbe9124fc112658219d8d4b71dd8c47ee9e440: Oh, he's gone. I hope he enjoys his retirement.
textByHashes.ba9e35b9d4e3345d414cd9670878b9d2701be5c0: Oh yes, of course! You are hereby welcome to visit the Piscatoris Fishing Colony at any time and make full use of our fishing spots!
textByHashes.9110f724464ec88c46d495cea269a62baa7e7885: Ah, I'm glad you asked that! You see, this is the only known place where you can catch monkfish!
textByHashes.fcc15ef80591544d57b174b35e75b7c1549812df: Yes - there's good eating on a monkfish. They heal more health than the swordfish and lobsters most adventurers carry around, but they're easier to catch than sharks.
textByHashes.b49a062388e698483c644ec05bcc55f0a9aa47dc: Indeed! I'm sure Arnold will help you send your monkfish to your bank account. Also, seaweed accumulates in the nets down by the shore, which you might find useful. Franklin says it's much quicker than trying to gather it on Entrana.
textByHashes.05679a9e6567adb671fd258f500df523cdd122d4: Finally, I'd like to give you a little token of my thanks.
textByHashes.9febaf75cdbd53a545af87b7352a4d12f8705cf1: Flourishing, now that the colonists are coming back! Soon all the finest restaurants will be serving monkfish!
textByHashes.2d829c56977a311c761b33ec30151b5c2f17a608: It's a pity those skeletons you brought here haven't gone away again, though. They're in the dormitories, which is rather annoying! So please take a little time to kick 'em around a bit.
textByHashes.c3491c869876520d24ec021d02df7da632de3cf6: Oh, and please don't call me Hermie.
